commands.review_summary:
This PR adds package-update local packaged-dist override capture and recovery, an opt-in reapply flag, content-hash dist inventory validation with legacy exceptions, CLI/docs output, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +1711, Tests +4941, Docs +18, Other +440. Total +7110 across 23 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live current-main reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source comparison shows current main lacks local package override capture/replay and content-hash inventory, so the behavior gap is source-reproducible.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are human package/update owner acceptance and contributor current-head proof, not a narrow automated repair.
